creator: Lewis Theobald
description: LibriVox recording of Double Falsehood; or, The Distrest Lovers by Lewis Theobald. Read in English by Librivox Volunteers. This play is based on story told in Cervantes' Don Quixote, and some believe it is a reconstruction of a lost play by Shakespeare and Fletcher. Duke Angelo and his son Roderick are concerned about the activities of the duke's younger son, Henriquez. They enlist his friend, Julio, as a spy. Before Julio left for the court, he foolishly asks Henriquez to secure his marriage to Leonora.
